meetings.title: NetSuite/Oracle demonstration
meetings.purpose: NetSuite pitch/demo vs SAP. ERP evaluation. French session all day (modules, in the weeds); they switch to English toward the end for you.
prep: You join 10:30am EST for the English portion. French team had modules/deep-dive earlier.
Compare: SAP 554k€/5yr, AACV 110.8k€, valid Q1 2026 — what does NetSuite offer?
Must-have scope: P2P, financial reporting (park/post), cost center, consolidation. No manufacturing.
Ask: implementation timeline, French/localization, Ariba vs NetSuite P2P.
